title: ANC00093 Blood Clot Formation Around Plaque
text_en: Formation of a blood clot which can impede blood flow through the artery, leading to a heart attack or a stroke.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: A coronary angioplasty procedure is also known as percutaneous coronary intervention.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: The procedure is done on blood vessels called coronary arteries.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: They supply your heart muscle with oxygen.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: The goal is to restore blood flow if a substance called plaque has significantly narrowed

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: these vessels.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: To begin the procedure, the doctor will numb the skin in your wrist.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: A needle will be placed through your skin and into your radial artery.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: Next, a flexible guide wire will be passed through the needle into your artery.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: Then, the needle will be withdrawn.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: It will be exchanged for a small, flexible tube called a sheath.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: This permits access into your artery.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: You may feel pressure when the doctor inserts the sheath, but you will not feel it moving

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: inside your artery.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: Next, the guide wire will be advanced up to your heart.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: A flexible tube called a catheter will be advanced over the wire to your coronary arteries.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: The progress of the procedure will be checked with an x-ray device called a flora scope.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: At this point, your doctor will remove the guide wire.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: Then, the doctor will move the tip of the catheter just inside the coronary artery to be examined.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: A special die will be injected into the artery.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: This allows your doctor to view it better with a flora scope.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: The die will make any blockages in the artery stand out.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: If a significant blockage is found, your doctor will insert a guide wire into the artery.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: A balloon on the tip of the catheter will be moved along the wire to the blockage.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: When the balloon inflates, it will expand the artery and improve the blood flow.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: You may feel some chest discomfort while this is happening.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: After this, your doctor will deflate and remove the balloon.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: A wire mesh tube called a stent may be placed in the treated area.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: The stent helps keep the coronary artery open.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: Your doctor will choose the proper size stent, which is compressed over a balloon.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: The stent will be moved into the artery over the same guide wire.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: When the balloon is inflated, the stent will expand and lock into place.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: After the balloon catheter is taken out, the stent will stay in place to hold the artery open.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: At the end of the procedure, the guide wire will be removed.

title: ANCE00174 Coronary Artery Angioplasty (Radial Access)
text_en: To find out more about coronary artery angioplasty, talk to your healthcare provider.
